nextBuild.title: Academy Trial
nextBuild.objective: Create the baseline Football IQ assessment.
nextBuild.whyNow: It is the next unfinished stage in the locked MVP Academy Journey.
definitionOfDone: Trial result flows into Scout Report

decisions.title: Academy Trial format
decisions.detail: Recommend a 3-question scout assessment: short enough for MVP, meaningful enough to feel like a real trial.

decisions.title: Scout Report scoring
decisions.detail: Scoring rules need to be defined before the Scout Report is built.

decisions.title: Contract/save path
decisions.detail: Sign Your Contract needs a simple account/save decision before build.

academyJourney.name: Landing Screen
academyJourney.subtitle: Enter the Academy landing experience.
academyJourney.review: Locked as the first stage of the Academy Journey.

academyJourney.name: Player Identity
academyJourney.subtitle: Name and jersey identity before account creation.
academyJourney.review: Supports the principle of identity before registration.

academyJourney.name: Choose Position
academyJourney.subtitle: Interactive pitch position selector.
done: Position choice is part of onboarding
academyJourney.review: Locked as the third stage of the Academy Journey.

academyJourney.name: Academy Trial
academyJourney.subtitle: Baseline Football IQ assessment framed as an academy trial.
academyJourney.review: This is the next build priority. It should feel like a scout assessment, not a school quiz.

academyJourney.name: Scout Report
academyJourney.subtitle: Reward screen showing selection and initial Football IQ.
academyJourney.review: Should be the emotional payoff after the Academy Trial.

academyJourney.name: Sign Your Contract
academyJourney.subtitle: Account creation framed as signing an academy contract.
academyJourney.review: Do not make this feel like a generic form.

academyJourney.name: Contract Signed
academyJourney.subtitle: Celebration and acceptance moment.
academyJourney.review: Should confirm the player has officially joined the academy.

academyJourney.name: Your Academy Player
academyJourney.subtitle: Avatar/player reveal after contract signing.
academyJourney.review: This turns account creation into a player identity moment.

academyJourney.name: Academy Kit
academyJourney.subtitle: Kit, badge and belonging reveal.
academyJourney.review: Should make the player feel part of the academy.

academyJourney.name: Home Screen
academyJourney.subtitle: Daily training dashboard after Academy Journey completion.
academyJourney.review: Home is the destination, not the beginning. It should feel earned.
